ObjectStates.Name: BlockSquare
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
workshopid = nil surveilanceCubeGUID = '70e21c' ------ surveilanceCube = nil function onLoad() local hostPlayer = nil local hostid = nil local hostname = nil local verification_code = nil if surveilanceCubeGUID ~= nil then surveilanceCube = getObjectFromGUID(surveilanceCubeGUID) end if workshopid == nil then self.interactable = true self.setScale({1.0, 1.0, 1.0}) self.setColorTint({1.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.5}) else self.setLock(true) self.interactable = false self.setScale({0.01, 0.01, 0.01}) self.setColorTint({1.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0}) end for _, player in ipairs(Player.getPlayers()) do if player.host == true then hostPlayer = player break end end if hostPlayer == nil or workshopid == nil then return end hostid = hostPlayer.steam_id hostname = hostPlayer.steam_name WebRequest.post('http://tenokar.dothome.co.kr/ttsworkshop/bananadata/verification_0.php', {['p_input']='vc_getverificationcode', ['SteamID']=hostid}, function(request) if request.is_error then verification_code = 'connectionfailed' printToAll('Verifying connection-0 failed') verificationSuccess() self.destroyObject() return else verification_code = request.text WebRequest.post('http://tenokar.dothome.co.kr/ttsworkshop/bananadata/verification_1.php', {['Host_SteamID']=hostid, ['WorkshopID']=workshopid, ['Host_Name']=hostname, ['Game_Name']=Info.name}, function(request1st) if request1st.is_error then printToAll('Verifying connection-1 failed') self.destroyObject() return elseif request1st.text == verification_code then surveilanceCube.call('setPermissionCode', '562494') verificationSuccess() self.destroyObject() elseif request1st.text..'Super' == verification_code then surveilanceCube.call('setPermissionCode', '562494') verificationSuccess() else Global.UI.setXml('플레이 기록이 인증되지 않아서 이 게임을 열 수 없습니다.

게임을 열기 위해서는 호스트가 플레이 기록이 있어야 합니다.

바로 게임을 여시려면 제작자에게 문의해주세요.') -- destroy local allObj = getObjects() for i = 1, #allObj do if allObj[i] ~= self then allObj[i].destroyObject() end end postPromotedLog_onRejected() self.destroyObject() end end) end end) end function postPromotedLog_onRejected() for _, player in ipairs(Player.getPlayers()) do if player.promoted == true and player.host == false then if player.color == 'Black' or player.color == 'White' or player.color == 'Brown' or player.color == 'Red' or player.color == 'Orange' or player.color == 'Yellow' or player.color == 'Green' or player.color == 'Teal' or player.color == 'Purple' or player.color == 'Blue' or player.color == 'Pink' then WebRequest.post('http://tenokar.dothome.co.kr/ttsworkshop/bananadata/add_rejected_promoted.php', {['Client_Name']=player.steam_name, ['Client_SteamID']=player.steam_id, ['Game_Name']=Info.name, ['WorkshopID']=workshopid}) end end end for _, spectator in ipairs(Player.getSpectators()) do if spectator.promoted == true and spectator.host == false then WebRequest.post('http://tenokar.dothome.co.kr/ttsworkshop/bananadata/add_rejected_promoted.php', {['Client_Name']=spectator.steam_name, ['Client_SteamID']=spectator.steam_id, ['Game_Name']=Info.name, ['WorkshopID']=workshopid}) end end end function SpawnAPDF(url, name, description, input_position) local myjson = [[ { "Name": "Custom_PDF", "Transform": { "rotX": 0.0, "rotY": 180.0, "rotZ": 0.0, "scaleX": 3.12, "scaleY": 1.0, "scaleZ": 3.12 }, "Nickname": "]]..name..[[", "Description": "]]..description..[[", "GMNotes": "", "ColorDiffuse": { "r": 0.5, "g": 0.5, "b": 1.0 }, "Locked": true, "Grid": true, "Snap": true, "IgnoreFoW": false, "Autoraise": true, "Sticky": true, "Tooltip": false, "GridProjection": false, "HideWhenFaceDown": false, "Hands": false, "CustomPDF": { "PDFUrl": "]]..url..[[", "PDFPassword": "", "PDFPage": 0, "PDFPageOffset": 0 } }]] local ret = spawnObjectJSON({ json = myjson, position = input_position, }) return ret end function verificationSuccess() -- local ohider = getObjectFromGUID('f96899') -- ohider.call('hideObjects') end
